mapper.insert: insert into user_agent_preference (user_id, focus_type, budget_min, budget_max, tags, summary) values (#{userId}, #{focusType}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}, #{tags}, #{summary})
mapper.update: update user_agent_preference set focus_type = #{focusType}, budget_min = #{budgetMin}, budget_max = #{budgetMax}, tags = #{tags}, summary = #{summary} where user_id = #{userId}
